caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black headphones sits in front of a professional microphone in a room filled with framed pictures on the wall and clothing racks in the background. His shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in white lettering. To his right stands a white mannequin wearing a white garment. The scene is marked by two logos: a circular logo on the far left and a red text logo on the far right that reads "RED VELVET". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his gaze and slightly adjusting his facial expression. He looks toward the left of the frame, then turns his head slightly and looks toward the right, maintaining a neutral to slightly contemplative demeanor while remaining seated before the microphone.
